domain: Chinese guqin (古琴) 7-string silk-string zither: pentatonic-tuned C2-D2-F2-G2-A2-C3-D3; 13 hui (徽) nodal-position marks at string divisions 1/2, 1/3, 1/4, ... 1/13 = harmonic nodes 2-13; 3 sound modes san-yin (open) + an-yin (pressed) + fan-yin (flageolet harmonic); 91 commonly-used harmonics across 7 × 13 grid; half-hui positions enable microtonal beyond 12-TET
specific_mechanism: GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI-3-MODE-HARMONIC-NODE-ALLOCATION: per-attention-head 3-mode spectral allocation with (1) 7-head-group × 13-frequency-node grid G_{7×13}: K attention heads partitioned into 7 string-groups; each group gets 13 harmonic-node RoPE frequency positions (partials 2-13); (2) 3-sound-mode per query token: positional encoding assigned (a) san-mode = fundamental open RoPE, (b) an-mode = pressed continuous RoPE, (c) fan-mode = flageolet harmonic-node — discrete RoPE at one of 13 hui frequencies; (3) half-hui microtonal interpolation: between hui_k and hui_{k+1}, allow fractional ν = α·hui_k + (1-α)·hui_{k+1}; (4) mode-selection token-class router: each input token classified into 3 sound-classes (san=factual lookup, an=reasoning, fan=harmonic-resonance/pattern); routing chooses RoPE mode; (5) 91-position frequency lookup table from 7 strings × 13 hui accessed by (group, hui-index) per head. Differs from R507 SYRIAC-OKTOECHOS-8-BAND (8-spectral-band attention-head partition weekly mode rotation + mode-theme binding entity/relation/penitence/long-range + Beth Gazo per-band template bank + annual epoch-boundary restart mode-rise q frequency RoPE base, no 13-hui + no 3-mode san/an/fan + no half-hui + no 7-head × 13-hui grid) by 7-head-group × 13-frequency-node grid + 3-mode token classification + half-hui microtonal + 91-position lookup.
llm_application: GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI-3-MODE-HARMONIC-NODE-ALLOCATION per-attention-head 3-mode spectral allocation with 7-head-group × 13-hui frequency-node grid G_{7x13} + 3-sound-mode san/an/fan per-token RoPE encoding + half-hui α-interpolation microtonal between hui_k and hui_{k+1} + mode-selection token-class router san=factual an=reasoning fan=pattern + 91-position lookup (7 × 13) by (group, hui-index). Differs from R402. R416. R431. R440. R457. R468. R279. R482. R495. R507 SYRIAC-OKTOECHOS (closest — 8-band + weekly mode + Beth Gazo template). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE + Mixed-Frequency RoPE + Hallucination Spectral Features + EliteKV by 7×13 grid + 3-mode + half-hui + token-router. Differs by 7-HEAD-GROUP × 13-FREQUENCY-NODE GRID + 3-SOUND-MODE TOKEN-CLASS RoPE + HALF-HUI MICROTONAL α-INTERPOLATION + 91-POSITION LOOKUP TABLE + MODE-SELECTION ROUTER.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV + Hallucination Spectral Features 2502.17598 + Hardware-Aligned Sparse Attention ACL 2025 + Long-Context 2506.16640 cover spectral-allocation per-head frequency space. GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI-3-MODE-HARMONIC-NODE-ALLOCATION adds (a) 7-head-group × 13-hui frequency grid + (b) 3-sound-mode san/an/fan token-class + (c) half-hui microtonal α-interpolation + (d) mode-selection token-class router + (e) 91-position lookup table. Recombination — borderline lookup.
